title: Count Binary Substrings
description: Đếm substring có số bit 0 và 1 bằng nhau (chỉ 0/1).
approach: Convert to +/-1; prefix sum + hash count equal zeros/ones.
memoryTip: Count binary substrings — prefix sum on transformed string.

solutions.c: int countBinarySubstrings696(char* s){ int g[50000],ng=0,i=0,n=strlen(s),ans=0,j; while(i<n){ j=i; while(j<n&&s[j]==s[i])j++; g[ng++]=j-i; i=j; } for(i=1;i<ng;i++) ans+=g[i-1]<g[i]?g[i-1]:g[i]; return ans; }

analysis.correctness: Run-length groups — adjacent min gives valid substrings.
